name: hextaui-video-player
title: Video Player
author: HextaUI
description: Plays video with accessible custom controls and local keyboard shortcuts.

changes: Replaced the project-root utility alias with the bundled, byte-identical upstream utility module.
Replaced the project-specific rounded-card utility with rounded-xl and added caller-supplied accessible labels plus per-instance range ids.
Scoped shortcuts to the focused player, composed the caller's video click handler, and made pointer, focus, touch, narrow-screen, and reduced-motion control states usable.
Made play and fullscreen failures observable, synchronized state from media events, clamped seek and volume values, and centralized timeout and event cleanup.

modifications.change: Replaced the project-root utility alias with a bundled relative import, replaced one project-only radius token, added accessible labels and unique range ids, localized keyboard shortcuts, made the control surface responsive to pointer and focus input, handled media and fullscreen failures, and consolidated media-event and timer cleanup.
modifications.reason: Make the copied player install-complete while keeping it usable across multiple instances, keyboard, touch, narrow, right-to-left, and reduced-motion contexts without leaking document listeners or stale timers.
